item.title: Winnie Harlow
item.description:
Born in Mississauga, Ontario, Winnie who is of Jamaican ancestry, was a victim of bullying for her vitiligo - probably not a surprise - called cow, zebra, and all manner of other disparaging slurs throughout her childhood.
The verbal harassment led to her changing schools numerous times and dropping out of high school, after which she contemplated suicide. But..
She was discovered by America's Next Top Model host Tyra Banks on Instagram, and subsequently became one of the 14 finalists of the 21st cycle in 2014. She was the only Canadian ever cast on ANTM.
In 2016 she was chosen as one of BBC's 100 Women. In 2018, she modelled at the Victoria's Secret Fashion Show. In addition to being a fashion model, she is also a public spokesperson on the skin condition. Also, bullies can go fuck themselves. To any bully victim, it gets better, hang in there
item.dc:creator: EnglightenMe

item.title: Domino's being hoe's
item.description: "Since Dominos is trending right now, here's another reason to hate that company. We have to sign this or you dont get hired. Anyone who tries to revoke this agreement gets their hours cut until they quit." Not mine but wanted to share.. WTF is going on in the US with simple worker rights? src: https://www.reddit.com/r/antiwork/comments/sj22lj/since_dominos_is_trending_right_now_heres_another/
item.dc:creator: BryanKL

item.title: Day 250: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me

item.title: Predators don't like kids being taught how to identify predators.
item.description: https://twitter.com/IamGMJohnson/status/1488903970198151169?t=Ha0aECAqc9aqTbBUQmkc9A&s=19 If you don't teach kids about sex, they'll teach themselves or be a victim of an abuser. Teach kids consent, don't violate that consent, trust your kids to deal with reality.

item.title: Creepy Art
item.description:
The Inferno by Giovanni da Modena
Untilted By Zdzislaw Beksinski
The Last Judgment By Jan Van Eyck,
Le Pandemonium By John Martin
Apocalypse By Albert Goodwin
Saturn Devouring His Son By Francisco Goya
The Fall of the Damned by Peter Paul Rubins
Mankind's Eternal Dilemma by Frans Francken the Younger
Satan Presiding at the Infernal Council by John Martin
